Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for 5 people at 13:00 on friday. If the booking fails how about 12:00. Make sure you get the reference number. You are also looking for a train. The train should arrive by 09:30 and should go to cambridge. The train should be on the same day as the restaurant booking and should depart from broxbourne. Once you find the train you want to make a booking for the same group of people. Make sure you get the reference number
